package main
import "fmt" 
import "math"
func main() {
    var a, b, c, p, area float64
    fmt.Scan(&a, &b, &c)
    p = (a+b+c)/2
    area = math.Sqrt(p * (p-a) * (p-b) * (p-c))
    fmt.Printf("%.2f\n", area)
}
